2786.reason: [This line incorrectly outputs the previous token (oldToken) instead of the current token being consumed. At the start of parsing, oldToken is null, which will cause a NullPointerException when trying to access its lexType and name. Additionally, tokens should be output as they are consumed (curToken), not after they've been replaced.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [This line incorrectly outputs the previous token (oldToken) instead of the current token being consumed.
